page.title: Shipping Address Verifier
page.subtitle: Control which shipping addresses are allowed at checkout.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Control where you ship by blocking countries, setting allowed-only lists, and restricting postal codes — all from this dashboard.
onboarding.step.cartWarningDesc: Customers see which countries are blocked
onboarding.readyToStartDesc: Add your first blocked or allowed country to start protecting your checkout.
celebration.title: Congratulations! Your shipping rules are now active!
celebration.desc: Blocked countries will see a warning in the cart and an error at checkout that prevents the order.
settings.title: Shipping Rules
settings.subtitle: Configure which countries and postal codes are allowed or blocked at checkout.
settings.enableValidatorDesc: When disabled, checkout will not block any addresses.
settings.allowedInfo: Type a country name or code and press Enter (e.g. "Israel" or "IL"). Leave empty to allow all countries.
settings.blockedInfo: Type a country name or code and press Enter. Blocked countries are always rejected, even if Allowed list is empty.
settings.noAllowed: No allowed countries set — all countries are allowed.
settings.requirePostalDesc: When enabled, orders without a postal code in the shipping address will be blocked.
settings.postalPatternInfo: Enter a pattern to block specific postal codes. For example: ^10001$ blocks only 10001. ^(97|98)\d{3}$ blocks all codes from 97000 to 98999. Leave empty to allow all postal codes.
settings.validateStateZipDesc: When enabled, orders where the US state and ZIP code don't match will be blocked at checkout.
settings.warningBanner: Blocked countries always fail. If Allowed list is set, any country not in it fails.
howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Set allowed and blocked countries, plus postal code restrictions from this dashboard.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Customers see a yellow warning in their cart listing countries you don't ship to.
howItWorks.step3Desc: If a blocked country is selected at checkout, a red error blocks the "Place Order" button.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Orders with allowed shipping addresses proceed normally without interruption.
howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.subtitle: Set up your shipping rules in two simple steps
howToUse.step1Desc: Go to the Manage tab and configure blocked countries, allowed countries, or postal code restrictions. Toggle the validator on.
howToUse.step2Desc: Save your configuration. The rules are applied automatically — customers see warnings in the cart and errors at checkout for blocked addresses.
howToUse.howItWorksDesc: When a customer enters a shipping address, the app checks it against your rules. In the cart, blocked addresses show a yellow warning. At checkout, they trigger a red error that disables the Place Order button. US addresses are also validated for state and ZIP code consistency.
tips.title: Tips & Best Practices
tips.tip1: Use the Allowed list to restrict shipping to specific countries. Leave empty to allow all.
tips.tip2: Blocked countries override the Allowed list — they are always rejected.
tips.tip3: Type full country names (e.g. "Iraq") or ISO codes (e.g. "IQ") — both work.
tips.tip4: Use regex patterns to block postal codes by range, e.g. ^100\d{2}$ blocks 10000-10099.
tips.tip5: Cart shows a warning. Checkout shows an error that disables the payment button.
tips.tip6: Changes take effect immediately — no need to redeploy your site.
help.title: Need Help?
help.description: Having trouble setting up your shipping rules? Our support team is here to help you get the best results.
help.faq1Desc: Make sure the validator is enabled in the Manage tab and you've saved your settings. Changes are applied instantly after saving.
help.faq2Desc: The app checks blocked countries, allowed lists, postal code patterns, and US state-ZIP mismatches. Make sure your rules cover the scenario.
help.contactUs: Still need help? Contact our support team:

dialog.clearConfirm: Are you sure? This will remove all countries from the list. This action cannot be undone.
toast.fixValidation: Please fix validation errors before saving.
error.notPublished: This site isn't published or Dev Mode is off. Open the Editor, enable Dev Mode, and publish the site.
ratePopup.title: How are you liking our app?

premium.postalCodeLocked: Postal code blocking is a Premium feature.
